bolera.title: Bowling — 10 Lanes
bolera.desc: Suitable for all ages. No advance booking or special footwear required.
bolera.seoText: The most complete bowling alley at Zenia Boulevard on the Alicante coast. Our 10 bowling lanes are adapted for all ages: families with children, groups of friends and couples. No prior reservation, shoes included and quick turns. The bowling alley in Orihuela Costa that combines quality, fair prices and guaranteed fun 365 days a year.

arcade.title: Arcade Machines & Games
arcade.desc: Simulators, redemption, billiards, table football. Ticket and prize system.
arcade.seoText: Our arcade room in Orihuela Costa features over 30 amusement machines: driving simulators, skill games and redemption with a ticket system redeemable for prizes. Billiards, table football and the latest family entertainment releases. The perfect plan when the sun is beating down or you simply want to extend the fun as a group.

pub.title: Dublin House
pub.desc: Imported beers, cocktails and authentic Irish atmosphere while you play or relax.
pub.seoText: Dublin House is the only Irish pub in Orihuela Costa with an authentic Celtic atmosphere. Draught Irish beer, craft cocktails and a snack menu to enjoy alongside your bowling game or to relax between rounds. The best bar at Zenia Boulevard where British and Irish leisure meets Mediterranean hospitality.

cumpleanos.title: Parties & Celebrations
cumpleanos.desc: All-inclusive packages for children and adults. Private area available.
cumpleanos.seoText: Celebrate the most special children's birthdays in Orihuela Costa. Our packages for birthday celebrations in Alicante include bowling games, arcade access, a set menu or snacks and a decorated private area. Birthday parties for groups of up to 30 people, available every day. Adults, hen/stag dos and corporate events also welcome.

header.sub: No reservation needed · No special shoes · Bumpers for kids

pricing.label: Prices
pricing.sub: Prices vary by day of the week and season

features.label: What we offer
features.body: Our bowling lanes in Orihuela Costa are fully equipped so you can enjoy from the very first throw. They include balls of different weights, bumpers for kids and everything needed to play comfortably with family or friends. Come anytime to Zenia Boulevard and play without prior booking.

items.title: No special footwear needed
items.desc: Play in your own shoes. No need to rent or buy anything special to enjoy the game.

items.title: Balls of all weights
items.desc: From the lightest for children to standard adult weights. We have the right weight for every player.

items.title: Bumpers for little ones
items.desc: We set up the guards so children always reach the end of the lane. Fun is guaranteed.

items.title: Ball ramps available
items.desc: We have launching ramps for the youngest and any player who wants a little extra help with their throws.

cta.label: Large groups
cta.body: If you're coming as a larger group, we have better options for you. Message us and we'll sort everything out.

reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.sub: People who have played here · Google Reviews

items.quote: We came with the kids and it was perfect, no fuss about shoes. Very comfortable and affordable.
items.author: María García

items.quote: The lanes are well maintained and the staff know what they're doing. Best bowling on the coast.
items.author: Carlos Ruiz

items.quote: Better than other bowling alleys in the area, and the prices are fair. Great for the whole family.
items.author: Elena Martínez

header.sub: Simulators · Redemption · Pool · Foosball · Ticket system

machines.label: Machines
machines.body: From driving simulators to classic arcade machines, our arcade zone in Orihuela Costa is designed for unlimited fun. Enjoy a wide selection of games for all ages — compete, win prizes and have an unforgettable day at Zenia Boulevard.

items.title: Simulators
items.desc: Driving, motorbikes and first-person adventures. Adrenaline guaranteed.

items.title: Redemption
items.desc: Earn tickets every game and redeem them for prizes from our catalogue.

items.title: Pool
items.desc: Professional pool tables available by the hour. Perfect for groups.

items.title: Foosball
items.desc: Quick foosball matches with friends or family. Always available.

system.label: System
system.sub: Play, earn tickets and redeem them for prizes in our arcade
system.ticketsDesc: Win tickets every game based on your performance. The better you play, the more you earn. Available on all arcade machines at Bowling Pleno Zenia, Orihuela Costa.
system.prizesDesc: Choose from our prize catalogue at Zenia Boulevard, Orihuela Costa. From plush toys to special items — the more tickets, the better the prize.

cta.label: Arcade
cta.body: The ticket system lets you redeem real prizes while you enjoy all the machines.
